summary: First full E2E pass for Aangan landing + archive + AI demo. Backend: 7/7 pytest tests passed (root, waitlist CRUD/idempotency/422, /api/ask grounded answer, /api/ask/stream SSE). Frontend: All requested flows passed — landing hero, waitlist form (POST to /api/waitlist verified), early-access form, all 6 archive tiles, sub-pages (tradition, voice-story, calendar, recipe, privacy, how-it-works, for-families), nav links, and Ask Aangan live streaming reply from Claude Sonnet 4.5.

issues: Two sporadic 404 errors observed in console during navigation across /archive routes (likely a missing image asset under Pexels imagery). Non-blocking but worth investigating which asset URL is 404ing.

action_items: Optional: trace the two 404s in the browser console while navigating to /archive — likely an image src referenced from Pexels imagery list that no longer resolves.

Optional polish: the floating Tradition Card splits 'Our Diwali / Morning' via
; if you want the literal string 'Our Diwali Morning' searchable in DOM text content, drop the
or add an aria-label.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger` is defined AFTER it is referenced inside ask_aangan_stream's except block (module-level logger init happens at line 190, while route is defined at line 109). Runtime works because the except path is only hit later, but this is fragile — move logging.basicConfig + logger = logging.getLogger(__name__) ABOVE the route definitions.

server.py: SSE encoding uses `content.replace('\n','\\n')` so newlines become literal backslash-n on the wire; the frontend SSE parser in /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js must decode them back to real newlines. Verified it does (chat output renders with line breaks), but consider using standard SSE multi-line `data:` lines instead of escaping.
server.py uses deprecated `@app.on_event('shutdown')`. Migrate to FastAPI lifespan handler.

Waitlist endpoint stores `created_at` as ISO string in Mongo but `WaitlistEntry` model expects datetime; existing code handles both branches but writing as datetime directly (Motor supports it) would simplify.
No rate limiting on /api/ask or /api/ask/stream — easily abusable for a public preview consuming LLM quota.
test_credentials: Not required — no auth in this app.
seed_data_creation: Inserted a few TEST_ prefixed waitlist entries via /api/waitlist during testing (idempotent by email).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_aangan_backend.py — uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from env. All 7 tests pass in ~17s. Ask Aangan streaming verified end-to-end via SSE with Claude Sonnet 4.5. Frontend testIDs are stable and match spec exactly (nav-home, nav-how-it-works, nav-the-family-archive, nav-privacy, nav-for-families, nav-early-access, nav-cta-begin-archive, hero-cta-primary, waitlist-form/-success, ea-form/-name/-email/-submit/-success, archive-tile-0..5, ask-aangan-page/ask-input/ask-send/ask-suggestion-*, tradition-card-full, cal-event-0).
